allow: Bash(python -m agent_core run "tool: echo this" --provider fake)
Bash(python -c "import glob,os,json; f=max\(glob.glob\('runs/*.jsonl'\),key=os.path.getmtime\); print\('events:', [r['event'] for r in \(json.loads\(l\) for l in open\(f,encoding='utf-8'\)\)]\)")
Bash(python -m agent_core memory add "I prefer dark mode and Python 3.11")
Bash(python -m agent_core memory add "I prefer dark mode and Python 3.11 always")
Bash(python -m agent_core run "I work mostly in Rust and Go" --provider fake)
